title: Wald (disambiguation)
content:
'''Wald''' may refer to one of the following:

==Canon==
*'''[[Wald]]''', a [[Rodian]] from [[Tatooine]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Wald (pilot)|Wald]]''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] for [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]
*'''[[W. Wald]]''', a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] from [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]
*'''[[Wald's Parts]]''', a junk shop

{{Disambig}}
